Connect to Google Sheets for live data

1
Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script. In the TARTool.gs file paste the latest script. Save.
2
Deploy → New deployment. Web App · Execute as Me · Who has access: Anyone. Copy the URL.
3
Paste the URL below and click Connect. The tool fetches live and auto-refreshes every 5 minutes. Click Connect again at any time to force an immediate refresh.
2
Deploy → New deployment. Web App · Execute as Me · Who has access: Anyone. Copy the URL.
3
Paste the URL below and click Connect FCO. Once connected, use the scope toggle at the top to switch between Main, FCO and Combined views.
